name: 2.1bu Lamper Gray - Brightroom™: Plastic Clothes Hamper with Built-In Handles, Open-Top, 1 Compartment, 19.55 Capacity
description:
This Lamper from Brightroom™ is just the right pick for breezing through tough laundry days. Featuring a deep rectangular silhouette with an open top design, this laundry hamper makes sorting through laundry a breeze. It's designed with one handle on each side for easy lifting and carrying from different rooms to the laundry room. Showcasing a mesh design for ventilation, this laundry basket features a solid gray hue to coordinate with a variety of decor styles.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
